description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style faucet featuring a tall, cylindrical main body with a high, arched spout. The spout is reinforced with a visible coiled spring, providing both flexibility and durability, and is attached to a secondary cylindrical sprayer head. The faucet includes a single lever handle mounted on the side for easy water flow and temperature control. The finish appears to be a matte or semi-gloss black, giving it a sleek and contemporary look suitable for urban environments such as public restrooms, commercial kitchens, or outdoor wash stations. The overall design emphasizes both functionality and aesthetic appeal, with robust construction and ergonomic features. The visible hose and spring mechanism suggest enhanced maneuverability for rinsing or cleaning tasks.
description: A tall, black industrial faucet with a high arched, spring-reinforced spout and a single side lever handle. Features a flexible hose and sprayer for versatile use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, narrow body, single side lever, and the spout aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched, spring-wrapped spout and the flexible hose extending to the sprayer head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main body, the lever handle, and the vertical alignment of the spout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature of the spout and the hose attachment, with the handle partially visible.
